title: glycyrrhiza subinermis
intro: Glycyrrhiza subinermis is a plant species native to China, belonging to the legume family and closely related to licorice root. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glycyrrhiza subinermis include reducing stress, improving immune function, and providing relief from digestive issues. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and infusions, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
